channel.title: Nick Needham — Blog
channel.description: Notes, build logs, and development work by Nick Needham.

item.title: Example new post
item.description: This is a sample Markdown post showing how future posts can be added without touching any JavaScript manifests.

item.title: Nostalgiac Things and Other Thoughts
item.description: New updates, finally finishing classes, making time for projects again, and missing the simpler days of older hardware and rougher PC setups.

item.title: Some Life Updates
item.description: Adjusting to a new job at Eli Lilly, trying to get back into a routine, and slowly making room for projects again.

item.title: Contentful Blog Test
item.description: A short note on moving to a new blog workflow using API calls and JavaScript instead of hand-writing every post as HTML.

item.title: Gameboy Advance SP Reshell
item.description: A quick shell-swap project for a beat-up GBA SP, including the teardown, the hinge struggle, and the clean finished result.

item.title: My upcoming projects
item.description: A quick look at the projects currently in progress, including USB-C cables, GameCube controller paracord, and N64 steel stick prototypes.

item.title: First project/blog post
item.description: The start of a SNES restoration project, from the funny pickup story to teardown, cleaning, rust, and early repair plans.
